title: Your Go-to Marketplace for Deals on Used & Secondhand Items | Mercari
memory: I have extracted the initial data from the Mercari search results page, identifying the result count (1000+), listing structure (image, title, price), and current filters. I am now confirming the specific details for the first 5 listings and any active overlays.

extract.query:
1. Location and exact value of the total result count.
2. Structure of the listing cards (what elements are visible like images, titles, badges).
3. Price display format and location (e.g., current price vs original price).
4. List the exact title and price for the first 5 listings.
5. Identify available filters (sidebar), sorting options, and navigation elements.
6. Identify any popups or overlays present on the screen.
